title: Launcher cold start
notes: Turbo reached ready; mono crossed the bounded 20-minute deadline and became usable only after extended two-stage autotuning.

title: Launcher warm and repeated start
notes: Three repeated starts exited nonzero with an executive-state lease error instead of an idempotent running result.

title: Stop restart and ownership
notes: Owned stop/restart and cleanup worked; a deliberately unowned but compatible dispatcher reuse fixture was not run.

title: Partial stack occupied port interrupted startup
notes: Owned port holder survived rejection; interrupted launcher was terminated by owned PID tree and standard cleanup closed all four ports.

title: Unknown profile and malformed config
notes: Unknown profile rejection is actionable; no user-supplied runtime config surface exists for a separate malformed-config fixture.

title: Full doctor smoke
notes: Full doctor had 816 passed, 13 skipped, 1 failed, yet the launcher returned zero; targeted clean-env rerun passed.

title: REST normal and validation-error contract
notes: Authoritative turbo REST contract passed; equivalent steady-state model-backed validation was not completed for both degraded mono profiles.

title: API stream interrupt cancel retry
notes: Normal NDJSON and retry paths passed, but true transport cancellation/late-terminal behavior remained incomplete.

title: WebSocket reconnect and cross-session isolation
notes: One WebSocket event and hostile-origin denial passed; two-session reconnect interleaving was not fully exercised.

title: End-to-end profile model mapping
notes: Configured identities matched, but both 31B profiles generated repeated 'cyclic' output and GUI paths timed out or fell back.

title: Offline-ready startup and recovery
notes: Loopback-refused recovery surrogate passed; scoped external-link isolation was unavailable without unsafe global network mutation.

title: Persistence backup restart lock and restore on copy
notes: Backup, integrity, restored-copy equality, DB lock, read-only, and temp failure probes passed; pending mission restart/idempotency remained incomplete.

title: CLI read-only command matrix
notes: Two 15/16 read-oriented matrices passed with diag correctly lease-guarded; exact host-bridge/file-search coverage across all profiles was incomplete.

title: CLI guarded mutation and error matrix
notes: Four mutation commands were rejected by the API ownership lease and persona, approvals, policy, and filesystem state stayed unchanged.

title: Startup latency throughput and resource release
notes: Turbo remained interactive; mono startup and 0.1-0.4 tok/s generation were practically unusable and both 31B profiles emitted degenerate output.

title: Bounded long-run conversation mission soak
notes: 120-second watchdog soak produced 19/19 healthy samples and 4/4 chats, but a successful long-running mission could not be demonstrated.

title: Frontend freshness service worker resize keyboard zoom
notes: Fresh assets and keyboard submit passed, but the GUI retained an old transcript when the backend home changed and reported zero conversations.

title: Final cleanup ownership and normal smoke
notes: Post-fault standard start, API/UI smoke, standard stop, final owned process/port inventory, and restoration of the initial offline Docker/WSL baseline all completed.
